items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 44
items.note: For 'Gneiss Try, Mr. Jelly Donut!' — defeat Brock in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 44 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Likely over-levelled here — catch Lanturns with a Super Rod or a Skarmory; an unused Suicune is a top pick.
